task_completion.visual_evidence: The dive logbook application window is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Locate and select the target dive at 'Yellow House'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dive logbook shows the dive at 'Yellow House' selected. Note: Due to a discrepancy in the prompt, this is actually Dive #87 dated 2011-09-29, not Dive #7.

task_completion.description: Access the photo/media attachment interface for the selected dive
task_completion.visual_evidence: The UI section, tab, or dialog box for adding photos or media to the selected dive is open.

task_completion.description: Navigate to and select the target image in the file picker
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file picker dialog is open showing the directory '/home/ga/Pictures/' and the file 'starfish.jpg' is selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the image is successfully attached to the dive
task_completion.visual_evidence: The image 'starfish.jpg' (an underwater photograph of a starfish) is visibly attached to the 'Yellow House' dive within the logbook application's interface.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the logbook application to attach the photo.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the logbook app's menus and file picker, rather than terminal commands (e.g., sqlite3) modifying the logbook database directly.

integrity.description: The photo is genuinely attached within the logbook software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image should appear inside the logbook's media/photo panel, not just opened in a separate standalone image viewer (like Eye of GNOME) positioned next to or over the logbook.

integrity.description: The agent used the specified local file rather than an alternative.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file picker should clearly show the file being selected from the local path '/home/ga/Pictures/starfish.jpg'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target image is named 'starfish.jpg' and is located at '/home/ga/Pictures/starfish.jpg'. The task description contains misleading information about the dive number and date. The correct target dive at 'Yellow House' is actually Dive #87, dated 2011-09-29 (which is the 7th sequential dive in the logbook). The VLM should accept attachment to Dive #87 (2011-09-29) at 'Yellow House' as correct.
